name: Nobody's Fool
recipeInstructions:
(From "Gooey Desserts, the Joy of Decadence")
1. Combine all ingredients except cream and garnishes in a saucepan.
2. Heat to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
4. Chill the mixture.
5. Cranberry sauce may be stored in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
6. Whip cream in a cold bowl with cold beaters until stiff peaks form.
7. To make ahead, place cream into a cheesecloth-lined wire mesh strainer set over a bowl and refrigerate, covered. This can be prepared up to 6 hours before serving.
8. To serve, fold 3/4 cup of the chilled cranberry sauce into the whipped cream.
9. Spoon into a stemmed serving dish.
10. Garnish with orange rind and mint.
